directive.title: RBAC: add role column to users table and authorize RFQ routes

auditor.summary: The implementation covers most functional requirements but has critical issues with auth configuration import patterns that violate the directive's constraints. The code imports from app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route which is explicitly prohibited, and uses a non-standard getServerSession pattern that may not work correctly in Next.js 14 App Router. Additionally, the Drizzle schema is missing the check constraint annotation, and several required tests are missing including load tests and security tests. The build is recoverable but requires significant fixes before it can be considered production-ready.

top_issues.description: Imports authOptions from app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route which violates the constraint 'MUST NOT modify any file under app/api/auth/' and creates a circular dependency risk. The auth route file is not designed to export configuration objects.

getServerSession is called with a non-standard 'req' parameter that may not work correctly with Next.js 14 App Router. The correct pattern for App Router is to call getServerSession(authOptions) without manually constructing the request object.
The PATCH handler imports from app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route, creating a dependency on auth files that should not be modified. This also violates the constraint about not modifying auth files.
